content.body:
Hi, I just filed an issue proposing a native `FileSystemDirectoryHandle.walk()` method for memory-safe recursive directory traversal. The motivation comes from a real production case (BioSonic, a bat research platform) where manually traversing millions of files caused browser crashes and event loop freezes. The current workaround requires non-obvious batching logic that most developers won't get right. The proposal is here: https://github.com/whatwg/fs/issues/184
would love any feedback on the direction.

content.body:
If somethings need clarification on the issue feel free to ask me!
Also its a feature enhancement proposal what you think about it annevk Austin Sullivan jesup
